data Tree a
  = Leaf
  | Node a (Tree a) (Tree a)
  deriving (Show, Eq)
```

data Expr
  = Lit Double
  | Add Expr Expr
  | Mul Expr Expr
  | Neg Expr
  deriving (Show)
```
